_note: Tunable trading parameters. Apply changes via: node scripts/trading/apply_params.mjs --apply
_blockedSymbols_note: Empty as of 2026-05-25. WTI re-enabled after operator confirmed BlackBull Trade panel now renders Buy/Sell buttons for WTI (prior 2026-05-22 unsupported finding was stale). LTCUSD/XAGUSD/BTCUSD all show split bracket routing to <SYMBOL>2026 dated-contract sibling — handled at runtime by naked_position_guard.mjs which re-attaches SL/TP from trades.csv intent on detection. WTI will be auto-repaired the same way if the bracket-strip behaviour applies to it.
_confluence_note: Trifecta = Trend + Level + Signal families (see scripts/trading/confluence.mjs). Soft gate raises effective score threshold when families are missing. Set requireTrifecta=true to hard-reject anything <3/3.
